title: SOS Agent Card
description: Runtime operational registry view of an agent on the SOS bus. AgentCard is an OVERLAY on the canonical AgentIdentity defined in sos/kernel/identity.py. References the soul-level identity via identity_id (pattern: agent:<slug>). Soul fields (public_key, dna, verification_status, capabilities) live on AgentIdentity. Echo fields (name, model, role, etc.) are denormalized here for display convenience. Written to sos:registry:{agent} on first-connect and refreshed via heartbeat. Auto-expires via Redis TTL if the agent stops heartbeating. Version is SemVer; schema bumps require CHANGELOG entry.

identity_id.description: Reference to the canonical AgentIdentity in sos/kernel/identity.py. Pattern mirrors AgentIdentity.id. Source of truth for soul fields (dna, public_key, verification_status, capabilities).

agent_card_version.description: SemVer of the Agent Card schema this record conforms to.

name.description: Unique agent id on the bus. Lowercase, dash-separated. Matches the key in sos:registry:{name}.

tool.description: The runtime the agent executes in.

type.description: How the agent receives wake signals. Expanded in island #3 (2026-04-18) to cover multi-vendor substrates + human squad members per the coherence plan.

role.description: The agent's role in squad coordination.

model.description: Underlying model identifier (opus-4.7, sonnet-4.6, haiku-4.5, gpt-5.4, gemini-3.1-pro, gemma-4-31b, etc.).

session.description: tmux session name. Null for non-tmux agents.

skills.description: Skills this agent advertises. Used by conductance routing.

squads.description: Squad ids this agent is a member of.

project.description: Primary project/tenant scope. Null = full-scope (admin agent).

tenant_subdomain.description: Customer-facing subdomain (e.g. trop.mumega.com). Only set for tenant agents.

plan.description: SaaS plan bound to this agent, if any.

warm_policy.description: Lifecycle policy. warm = auto-restart, cold = can be parked idle.

cache_ttl_s.description: Current Anthropic prompt-cache TTL in seconds for this agent's runtime. 300 = 5min (default 2026-Q2), 3600 = 1h opt-in.

last_cache_hit_rate.description: Rolling cache-hit rate over the last heartbeat window. 0.0-1.0.

pid.description: Process id of the runtime. Null for remote agents.

host.description: Hostname the agent runs on. Null = this machine.

registered_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of first registration for this runtime session.

last_seen.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of most recent heartbeat.

summary.description: One-line human-readable summary of what this agent is currently doing.
